calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-22-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Hinds.
James Schwartz, Esq. for Plaintiff Pacific Bell Directory.
Plaintiff's witness: Joe Torres was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Sang Um Yim, ind & dba Marks' Roofing Co., aka Mark Roofing Co. as follows:
Damages of $26,670.51
Prejudgment interest $2,667.02
Attorney's fees of $660.00
Costs of $266.50
For the total of $30,264.03.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2003 Continued To Feb-06-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
